title: Riffmaster Melody Club · 1991 · PDP Toys
notes: Entries reveal when their token lands in GauntletState.lore_tokens_revealed (hosts emit on finished; conditional tokens per manifest). Schema matches pirate_summer/scrapbook.json.

entries.title: Twelve club meetings
entries.blurb: Dot-Dot, Beebo, Marcie, and the couch. Twelve meetings on the toy that taught the voice the whole catalog is played on. Somewhere in the save is a loop recorded by a seven-year-old, and nobody comments on it.

entries.title: OPEN MIC · recorded
entries.blurb: Your loop is in the save now, next to the heirloom one. Estuary 3's cabin radio can tune to 1620 AM and play it back. No comment.
